### [263] [Modeling Depth Ambiguity: A Mixture-Density Representation for Flying-Point-Free Depth Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02552)
*Siyuan Bian,Congrong Xu,Jun Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出MDA（混合密度表示）方法解决深度估计中的"飞点"问题。传统单深度假设建模在物体边界处产生虚假3D点，MDA允许每个像素预测多个深度假设及概率，在边界、透明物体和天空区域等方面取得了显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管深度估计技术有所进步，但飞点仍是普遍问题。在物体边界附近，像素跨越前景和背景表面，单深度假设模型无法同时保留两种可能性，导致预测偏向中间空旷区域，产生不在任何实际表面上的虚假点。

Method: 提出MDA混合密度表示方法，让模型为每个像素预测多个深度假设及关联概率。解码时从最可能的假设中选择深度，而非放置在假设之间的空区。该框架还扩展用于透明物体（预测多层深度）和天空区域（分离无限天空与有限深度）。

Result: 在不同骨干网络上，MDA大幅改善边界重建质量，基本消除飞点现象，即使在严重输入模糊下效果仍佳，且运行时开销可忽略。还成功处理了透明物体的多层深度和天空区域的边界问题。

Conclusion: MDA通过多假设混合密度表示有效解决了深度估计中的飞点难题，该方法通用性强、可扩展至其他场景（如透明物体和天空），在保持低开销的同时显著提升边界重建质量。

Abstract: Despite advances in depth estimation, flying points remain a persistent failure mode: near object boundaries, depth estimators often predict spurious 3D points in the empty space between foreground and background surfaces. We trace this artifact to a standard modeling choice: assigning each pixel a single depth hypothesis. At boundaries, a pixel can straddle a foreground and a background surface, so its true depth is ambiguous between the two. A model that predicts a single depth cannot keep both possibilities, so training instead pulls the prediction toward an intermediate depth that lies on neither surface. We address this with MDA, a mixture-density representation that lets the model predict multiple depth hypotheses and their associated probabilities for each pixel. Near boundaries, different hypotheses can align with different surfaces, and the decoded depth is selected from one of these hypotheses rather than placed in the empty space between them. Across different backbones, MDA substantially improves boundary reconstruction and largely removes flying-point artifacts even under severe input blur, while adding negligible runtime overhead. The same mixture-density framework naturally extends to transparent objects, where it predicts multiple depth layers at transparent pixels, and to sky regions, where a dedicated component separates the unbounded sky from finite-depth regions, producing flying-point-free skylines. Project Page: https://biansy000.github.io/mda-site/.

</details>


### [264] [Cross-Domain Dead Tree Detection via Knowledge Distillation in Aerial Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02303)
*Anis Ur Rahman,Mete Ahishali,Einari Heinaro,Samuli Junttila*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究提出TreeMort-1T-UNet模型，通过知识蒸馏(KD)将芬兰航拍数据训练的模型迁移到波兰、德国和爱沙尼亚等目标域，实现死树检测，特征级KD表现最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球树木死亡率上升，准确检测死树对森林健康评估至关重要，但领域差异和标注数据稀缺限制了模型的泛化能力。

Method: 使用四种KD变体(Basic、Self、Feature-level、Ensemble)进行迁移学习，结合Mean Tree IoU、Instance F1-score、Instance Precision、Mean Centroid Error等指标及余弦相似度、CKA、SSIM、t-SNE、线性探测等表征分析方法评估。

Result: 特征级KD在波兰数据集上取得最佳性能：Mean Tree IoU为0.106，Instance F1为0.63，Instance Precision为0.55，Mean Centroid Error为3.039；在其他目标域也表现稳健(芬兰0.15，波兰0.67，德国0.60，爱沙尼亚0.59)，且低数据场景下表现优越，假阳性少。

Conclusion: 知识蒸馏能有效增强遥感迁移学习的泛化能力，特征级KD提供最佳的表征不变性，适合精度关键的林业应用，为生态监测和可持续森林管理提供可扩展的工具。

Abstract: Detecting dead trees in aerial imagery is vital for assessing forest health, especially as tree mortality increases globally due to climate change, but domain variability and scarce labeled data often limit model generalization. This study advances the TreeMort-1T-UNet (Tree Mortality 1-Task U-Net) model, initially trained on Finnish aerial imagery (source domain), by applying knowledge distillation (KD) to adapt it to various target domains, including Polish, German, and Estonian datasets representing diverse forest types. We assess four KD variants: Basic, Self, Feature-level, and Ensemble, against a fine-tuning baseline, using Mean Tree IoU, Instance F1-score, Instance Precision, and Mean Centroid Error as key metrics, alongside representational analyses (e.g., cosine similarity, CKA, SSIM, t-SNE, and linear probing) for domain invariance. Feature-level KD outperforms others, yielding a Mean Tree IoU of 0.106, Instance F1-score of 0.63, Instance Precision of 0.55, and Mean Centroid Error of 3.039 on the Polish dataset, with robust precision across other target domains (e.g., 0.15 on Finnish, 0.67 on Polish, 0.60 on German, 0.59 on Estonian). It excels in low-data scenarios with fewer false positives and shows superior representational invariance (e.g., higher deep-layer CKA/SSIM, better domain mixing in t-SNE, and linear probing AUC of 0.95), making it ideal for precision-critical forestry applications. Additional ablation studies confirm that key components like feature alignment enhance its performance balance across metrics. Our findings demonstrate KD's potential to enhance transfer learning in remote sensing, offering a scalable, domain-robust tool for ecological monitoring and sustainable forest management.

</details>


### [265] [AdaCodec: A Predictive Visual Code for Video MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02569)
*Haowen Hou,Zhen Huang,Zheming Liang,Qingyi Si,Chenglin Li,Shuai Dong,Kele Shao,Ruilin Li,Dianyi Wang,Nan Duan,Jiaqi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种名为AdaCodec的预测性视觉代码接口，用于视频多模态大语言模型(video MLLMs)。该方法不再将每帧作为独立RGB图像编码，而是只在场景无法从先前上下文准确预测时才发送完整参考帧，其他时候仅传输紧凑的帧间变化描述(P-tokens)，包括运动和预测残差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有video MLLMs通常将采样的每一帧作为独立RGB图像编码，导致视觉令牌重复了先前帧中已有的内容，造成时间冗余。视频本身具有时间冗余性，相邻帧共享大部分对象、背景和布局，因此存在更直接的视频接口设计空间。

Method: AdaCodec采用条件预测成本机制：只有当条件预测成本高时才对完整参考帧进行全视觉令牌编码；否则，将帧间变化（包括运动和预测残差）编码为紧凑的P-tokens。通过自适应地决定何时发送完整参考帧 vs 紧凑变化描述，提高 token 效率。

Result: 在匹配的视觉token预算下，AdaCodec在全部11个基准测试中均优于Qwen3-VL-8B基线。即使将预算降低至1/7（32k tokens），AdaCodec仍能在所有长视频基准测试上超越224k基线；在5个通用视频基准测试上，AdaCodec在提升平均分数的同时，将首token生成时间从9.26秒大幅削减至1.62秒。

Conclusion: 通过引入预测性视觉代码接口AdaCodec，有效解决了video MLLMs中的时间冗余问题。该方法显著提升了token效率，降低了延迟，并保持了或超越了现有方法的性能水平，为构建更高效的长视频理解模型提供了新思路。

Abstract: Video is temporally redundant: adjacent frames usually share most objects, background, and layout. Yet existing video multimodal large language models (video MLLMs) usually encode each sampled frame as an independent RGB image, causing visual tokens to repeat content already present in earlier frames. This suggests a more direct video interface: send a full reference frame only when the scene cannot be predicted well from prior context, and otherwise transmit a compact description of inter-frame changes. We call this interface a \emph{{predictive visual code}}, and instantiate it for video MLLMs as \textbf{{AdaCodec}}. AdaCodec spends full visual tokens on a reference frame only when its conditional predictive cost is high; otherwise, it encodes inter-frame changes, including motion and prediction residuals, as compact P-tokens. Across all eleven benchmarks, AdaCodec improves over the Qwen3-VL-8B per-frame RGB baseline at a matched visual-token budget. Even at $1/7$ the budget, AdaCodec with 32k tokens surpasses the 224k baseline on all long-video benchmarks; on five general-video benchmarks, it raises the average score while substantially cutting time-to-first-token from 9.26s to 1.62s.

</details>


### [266] [Deep Learning for Remote Sensing to Improve Flood Inundation Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02310)
*Yogesh Bhattarai,Vijay Chaudhary,Wai Lim Kim,Sanjib Sharma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）和掩码扩散Transformer架构的云层去除框架，用于洪水光学遥感影像处理。该方法利用自注意力机制捕获空间上下文，通过掩码标记学习显式重建云遮挡区域，在Sentinel-2B多光谱洪水场景上训练并生成无云图像。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 洪灾是全球最普遍的自然灾害，及时准确的洪水淹没图对于灾害风险管理至关重要。光学卫星可提供高分辨率多光谱观测，但极端降水事件期间的云层覆盖严重影响其可用性。传统时间合成或插值方法无法捕捉洪水的动态变化特征。

Method: 提出基于Masked Diffusion Transformer架构的去噪扩散概率模型框架。核心创新点包括：1）使用自注意力机制捕获更广泛的空间上下文信息；2）采用掩码token建模方法显式学习云遮挡区域的重建；3）在具有逼真云模式的多光谱Sentinel-2B洪水场景上进行训练。

Result: 实验结果表明：生成的云-free图像具备良好的视觉保真度和水文一致性；在标准图像质量指标和洪水专项水文指标上均表现出色；有效提升了水体的连续性检测；保留了用于水体检测指数的关键光谱特征。

Conclusion: 扩散生成建模为Optical洪水监测中的云去除提供了稳健且物理一致的替代方案，能够实现更可靠、连续的观测，有助于灾害风险管理和洪水相关决策，具有重要的实际应用价值。

Abstract: Flooding is the most pervasive natural disaster worldwide. Timely and accurate flood inundation mapping are essential for informing disaster risk management. Optical satellite missions provide high-resolution, multispectral observations critical for flood detection and inundation mapping. However, their operational utility is severely constrained by cloud cover during extreme precipitation events. Conventional cloud-removal techniques based on temporal compositing or interpolation often fail to capture inundation dynamics. In this study, we introduce a cloud-removal framework for flood imagery based on Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models, leveraging the Masked Diffusion Transformer architecture. The proposed approach exploits self-attention mechanisms to capture wider spatial context and employs masked token modeling to explicitly learn the reconstruction of cloud-obscured regions. Trained on multispectral Sentinel-2B flood scenes with realistic cloud patterns, the model generates cloud-free image realizations that preserve both visual fidelity and hydrological consistency. Reconstruction performance is evaluated using standard image quality metrics alongside flood-specific hydrological measures, demonstrating improved continuity of water bodies and preservation of spectral signatures critical for water detection indices. The results indicate that diffusion-based generative modeling offers a robust and physically consistent alternative for cloud removal in optical flood monitoring, enabling more reliable, continuous observations to support disaster risk management and flood-related decision making.

</details>


### [267] [Mitigating Perceptual Judgment Bias in Multimodal LLM-as-a-Judge via Perceptual Perturbation and Reward Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02578)
*Seojeong Park,Jiho Choi,Junyong Kang,Seonho Lee,Jaeyo Shin,Hyunjung Shim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了多模态大语言模型(MLLM)作为评判者时存在的一种新问题——感知判断偏差(Perceptual Judgment Bias)。当视觉证据与文本线索冲突时，MLLM评判者倾向于奖励看似合理但与视觉感知不符的答案，而非真正基于视觉的正确回答。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型虽然展现出强大的推理能力，但作为自动化评判者时可靠性受限。现有研究缺乏对这类模型的感知判断偏差进行系统性分析的工具和方法论。

Method: 研究者通过可控的视觉扰动方法构建了感知扰动评判数据集(Perceptually Perturbed Judgment Dataset)，该数据集生成了最小编辑的反事实响应以隔离感知错误。同时提出了一种统一的训练框架，结合基于GRPO的结构化奖励和批量排序目标，无需显式的成对标签即可实现连贯全局排序。

Result: 实验在多种MLLM-as-a-Judge基准测试上表明，该方法显著提升了感知保真度、排序一致性，并与人类评估高度对齐。

Conclusion: 为训练具有感知基础、可解释且能抵御视觉-推理冲突的多模态评判者提供了一条可扩展且可泛化的路径。

Abstract: Recent multimodal large language models have demonstrated strong reasoning ability, yet their reliability as automated evaluators remains limited by a critical weakness: when visual evidence conflicts with textual cues, MLLM judges tend to reward plausible narratives over perceptually correct answers. We identify and systematically analyze this phenomenon, which we term Perceptual Judgment Bias. Through controlled visual perturbations, existing multimodal judges frequently anchor on the response text instead of their own visual perception, leading to inconsistent and non-verifiable evaluations. To address this issue, we introduce the Perceptually Perturbed Judgment Dataset, which constructs minimally edited counterfactual responses that isolate perceptual errors and enable verifiable supervision. Building on this dataset, we develop a unified training framework that combines a structured GRPO-based reward with a batch-ranking objective, achieving coherent global ordering without explicit pairwise labels. Experiments across diverse MLLM-as-a-Judge benchmarks show that our approach substantially improves perceptual fidelity, ranking coherence, and alignment with human evaluation. Our results establish a scalable and generalizable pathway for training multimodal judges that are perceptually grounded, interpretable, and robust to visual-reasoning conflicts.

</details>

### [270] [Detecting Pen-In-Air States from Video: A Proof-of-Concept Toward Complementary Handwriting Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02342)
*Lauren Sismeiro,Remy Plastre,Binbin Xu,Frederic Puyjarinet,Gerard Dray*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究提出利用顶视视频（而非传统数位板）来检测手写笔的悬空状态，作为书写障碍筛查的低成本非侵入式补充方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数位板只能捕获近纸面范围的Pen-Up行为，可能遗漏高抬手的空中动作；需要探索视频作为互补信息源。

Method: 提出可解释的混合管道：1) 使用YOLO基检测器追踪笔尖；2) 提取运动学特征；3) 机器学习分类。采用Leave-One-Video-Out (LOVO)评估协议。

Result: 在多样化手写视频数据集上，Pen-Up片段事件级检测达到F_2分数0.805，强调召回率的筛查导向设置下表现可靠。

Conclusion: 视频-based Pen-Up检测可行，可作为数位板的低成本非侵入式补充方案，为未来大规模研究奠定基础。

Abstract: Dynamic aspects of handwriting are critical for assessing developmental disorders such as dysgraphia and are typically captured using digitizing tablets. However, tablet-based sensing restricts analysis of Pen-Up behavior to a short proximity range above the writing surface, potentially missing high-lift in-air movements. As a proof of concept, we investigate whether top-view video can provide a complementary source of information for inferring pen-contact states without relying on tablet proximity sensing. We propose an interpretable hybrid pipeline combining pen-tip tracking using a YOLO-based detector with kinematic feature extraction and machine learning classification. A pilot dataset of diverse handwriting videos was manually annotated at the frame level and evaluation used a Leave-One-Video-Out (LOVO) protocol. The method achieved reliable event-level detection of Pen-Up segments, with an F_2 score up to 0.805, consistent with the emphasis on recall in a screening-oriented setting. These results support the feasibility of video-based Pen-Up detection as a low-cost and non-intrusive complement to digitizing tablets, and provide a foundation for future large-scale studies.

</details>


### [271] [Untitled](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02346)

### [272] [TROPHIES: Temporal Reconstruction of Places, Humans, and Cameras from Multi-view Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02350)
*Jinpeng Liu,Yukang Xu,Yutong Li,Xingyu Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了TROPHIES框架，用于从多视角视频中统一重建动态人体、静态场景和相机姿态，实现全局一致的4D重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作通常假设单视角输入或分离处理人体、场景和相机，无法恢复连贯的几何结构、稳定的运动和物理对齐的轨迹，因此需要引入统一的人-场景-相机重建任务。

Method: TROPHIES包含两个人类分支：人体分支通过时空推理建模人体，场景分支通过人类感知注意力重建静态几何。全局对齐和优化模块通过尺度一致性、接触先验和跨视角时间一致性约束来耦合两个分支。

Result: 在EgoHuman和EgoExo4D数据集上的实验表明，TROPHIES实现了全局对齐、物理上合理的4D重建，在全局保真度和人-场景一致性方面始终优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 该研究成功地将分散的重建任务统一到一个框架中，通过联合优化人体、场景和相机，显著提升了4D重建的质量和一致性，为多视角视频理解提供了新的研究方向。

Abstract: Reconstructing humans and their surrounding environments in a globally consistent 4D space is essential for comprehensive perception. However, prior works typically assume single-view inputs or decouple humans, scenes, and cameras, making them unable to recover coherent geometry, stable motion, and physically aligned trajectories. These limitations motivate us to introduce a new task: unified human-scene-camera reconstruction from multi-view videos, which aims to jointly estimate dynamic humans, static scenes, and camera poses in one global coordinate frame. We propose TROPHIES--Temporal Reconstruction of Places, Humans, and Cameras from Multi-view Videos-a unified framework tailored for this task. TROPHIES features a Human Branch that models humans through temporal and spatial reasoning, and a Scene Branch that reconstructs static geometry with human-aware attention. A global alignment and optimization module couples both branches by enforcing scale consistency, contact priors, and cross-view temporal coherence. Experiments on EgoHuman and EgoExo4D demonstrate that TROPHIES achieves globally aligned, physically plausible 4D reconstructions and consistently outperforms existing paradigms in both global fidelity and human-scene consistency.

</details>


### [273] [Multi-modal Video Representation Alignment for Robust Self-supervised Driver Distraction Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02352)
*David J. Lerch,Livien Majer,Zeyun Zhong,Manuel Martin,Frederik Diederichs,Rainer Stiefelhagen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的自监督多模态视频表示学习框架，用于解决驾驶员分心检测等多模态应用中的负样本和正样本噪声问题。该方法通过引入基于循环一致性的软目标和基于相似度分布的加权机制，将传统的成对对齐扩展到全局多模态对齐，并在Drive&Act数据集上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的对比学习方法（如InfoNCE）假设所有负样本信息量相同、所有正样本可靠，但在多模态数据中这一假设常因视角变化、遮挡或语义重叠而被违反。需要一种能够同时处理故障负样本和不可靠正样本的全局多模态对齐方法。

Method: 提出两个核心创新：1）使用循环一致性得分生成软目标来放松硬负样本假设；2）基于相似度分布的加权机制来减轻噪声或故障正样本的影响。将传统成对对齐扩展为全局多模态设置，聚合所有模态对之间的对齐信息。

Result: 在Drive&Act数据集上的实验表明，该方法在RGB、IR、Depth和Skeleton四种模态上均一致优于现有的成对对齐和全局对齐基线方法。跨视角消融实验进一步展示了对未见相机视角的强大泛化能力。

Conclusion: 该框架为自监督全局多模态表示学习提供了一种可扩展且有效的解决方案，能够实现可靠的驾驶员分心检测，为现实世界的多模态视频理解奠定了基础。

Abstract: Robust self-supervised learning of multi-modal video representations is critical for real-world applications such as driver distraction detection, where multiple sensors provide complementary but noisy signals. Conventional contrastive objectives, such as InfoNCE, assume all negatives are equally informative and all positives are reliable. However, this assumption is frequently violated in multi-modal data due to viewpoint changes, occlusions, or semantic overlap across modalities. In this work, we propose a novel framework for multi-modal global alignment that addresses these challenges by jointly modeling faulty negatives and unreliable or faulty positives. We introduce soft targets derived from cycle-consistency scores to relax the hard-negative assumption, and a weighting mechanism based on similarity distributions to mitigate the impact of noisy or faulty positives. Our approach extends traditional pairwise alignment to a principled global multi-modal setting, aggregating alignment information across all modality pairs. We evaluate our method on the Drive&Act dataset, demonstrating that it consistently outperforms both pairwise and existing global alignment baselines across RGB, IR, Depth, and Skeleton modalities. Cross-view ablation studies further show strong generalization to unseen camera perspectives, highlighting the robustness of our representations. Overall, our framework provides a scalable and effective solution for self-supervised global multi-modal representation learning, enabling reliable driver distraction detection and pioneering in real-world multi-modal video understanding. Our code will be published on GitHub.

</details>


### [274] [PRIMA: Boosting Animal Mesh Recovery with Biological Priors and Test-Time Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02366)
*Xiaohang Yu,Ti Wang,Mackenzie Weygandt Mathis*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PRIMA是一个用于在严重物种和姿态不平衡情况下进行稳健3D四足动物网格恢复的框架，通过整合生物先验、测试时适应策略和大规模伪3D数据集构建来解决动物重建中的长尾分布问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动物重建方法因有限的3D监督和长尾物种分布，往往回归到平均形状和姿态，导致对代表性不足的动物和稀有姿态泛化性能差。

Method: 提出三个关键贡献：1) 使用BioCLIP嵌入作为生物先验注入语义和形态知识；2) 引入测试时适应(TTA)策略，利用2D重投影约束和辅助关键点指导细化SMAL预测；3) 基于TTA框架构建大规模Quadruped3D伪3D数据集。

Result: 在Animal3D、CtrlAni3D、Quadruped2D和Animal Kingdom数据集上取得最先进结果，特别是在代表性不足的物种和挑战性姿态上有显著提升。

Conclusion: 生物先验和适应驱动的数据扩展对于可扩展且泛化性强的动物网格恢复至关重要。

Abstract: We present PRIMA (*PRI*ors for *M*esh *A*daptation), a framework for robust 3D quadruped mesh recovery under severe species and pose imbalance. Existing animal reconstruction methods often regress toward mean shapes and poses due to limited 3D supervision and long-tailed species distributions, resulting in poor generalization to underrepresented animals and rare articulations. PRIMA addresses this challenge through three key contributions. First, we incorporate BioCLIP embeddings as biological priors to inject semantic and morphological knowledge into the reconstruction process, enabling more accurate and generalizable shape prediction across diverse quadrupeds. Second, we introduce a test-time adaptation (TTA) strategy that refines SMAL predictions using 2D reprojection constraints together with auxiliary keypoint guidance, improving pose and shape estimation while enabling the generation of high-quality pseudo-3D annotations from existing 2D datasets. Third, leveraging this TTA framework, we construct Quadruped3D, a large-scale pseudo-3D dataset that covers diverse species and pose variations to systematically improve model performance. Extensive experiments on Animal3D, CtrlAni3D, Quadruped2D, and Animal Kingdom demonstrate that PRIMA achieves state-of-the-art results, with particularly strong improvements on underrepresented species and challenging poses. Our results highlight the importance of biological priors and adaptation-driven data expansion for scalable and generalizable animal mesh recovery. Code is available at https://github.com/AdaptiveMotorControlLab/PRIMA.

</details>

### [280] [Reason-Then-Retrieve for CoVR-R with Structured Edit Prompts and Dense-Sparse Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02450)
*DongQing Liu,MengShi Qi,HongWei Ji*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CoVR-R是一个基于Qwen3.5-27B的零样本推理视频检索系统，用于根据参考视频和编辑指令检索目标视频。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主要困难在于目标视频无法直接描述，需要从对象身份、动作顺序、最终状态、手部交互和场景转换等细粒度变化中进行推理推断。

Method: 构建零样本"先推理后检索"管道：1)为每个图库视频生成检索导向的结构化描述和密集嵌入（利用生成token隐藏状态与token依赖权重）；2)对查询先进行编辑推理，生成目标视频描述，其隐藏状态作为查询嵌入；3)结合TF-IDF分支并使用分割特定权重进行排名融合。

Result: 验证集最佳结果：R@1达80.81，R@5达94.86，R@10达97.11，R@50达98.59。盲测集结果：R@1达89.73，R@5达95.79，R@10达96.63，R@50达97.98。

Conclusion: 该方法在细粒度组合视频检索任务上展现出优秀的零样本能力，无需领域特定训练即可达到较高的检索精度。

Abstract: CoVR-R studies reason-aware composed video retrieval: given a reference video and an edit instruction, the system must retrieve the target video that satisfies the edit. The main difficulty is that the target is not described directly; it must be inferred from fine-grained changes in object identity, action order, final state, hand interaction, and scene transition. We build a zero-shot reason-then-retrieve pipeline around Qwen3.5-27B. For each gallery video, the model generates a retrieval-oriented structured description and a dense embedding by pooling generated-token hidden states with token-dependent weights. For each query, the model first performs edit reasoning over the reference video and instruction, then generates a target-video description whose hidden states serve as the query embedding. We complement dense retrieval with a TF-IDF branch over the generated texts and fuse the two rankings with split-specific weights. On validation, the current best submission reaches 80.81 at R@1, 94.86 at R@5, 97.11 at R@10, and 98.59 at R@50. On the blind test split, it reaches 89.73 at R@1, 95.79 at R@5, 96.63 at R@10, and 97.98 at R@50.

</details>

### [282] [Retrieve What's Missing: Coverage-Maximizing Retrieval for Consistent Long Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02479)
*Minseok Joo,Dogyun Park,Taehoon Lee,Kyujin Lee,Hyunwoo J. Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: COVRAG是一种基于深度记忆检索的视频生成框架，通过预训练3D先验构建目标视图覆盖图作为轻量级3D记忆证据，并采用残余覆盖增益最大化来选择记忆帧，从而在长视频生成中保持几何一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决长时序自回归视频生成中保持长期几何一致性的挑战。现有方法要么使用相机位姿或视场重叠（轻量但粗糙），要么使用显式3D重建（精细但代价高），需要一种兼顾效率与精度的方案。

Method: 提出两层创新设计：1) 利用预训练3D先验构建目标视图覆盖图作为轻量级3D记忆证据；2) 采用残余覆盖增益最大化迭代选取记忆帧，优先检索能解释当前上下文未覆盖目标区域的帧。同时引入滑动窗口深度缓存以提升长视频生成的Scalability。

Result: 在RealEstate10K和DL3DV10K数据集上的实验表明，COVRAG在保持低延迟的同时显著提升了长时序几何一致性。

Conclusion: COVRAG为长视频生成中的几何一致性问题提供了一种有效的解决方案，通过深度信息驱动的记忆检索机制，在精度和效率之间取得了较好的平衡。

Abstract: Maintaining long-term geometric consistency remains challenging for long-horizon autoregressive video generation. Memory-augmented generative models address this by retrieving historical frames, but their effectiveness depends on two key design choices: what 3D-geometric evidence should represent past observations, and how memory frames should be selected from this evidence. Existing methods often rely on camera poses or field-of-view overlap, which are lightweight but too coarse to reason about pixel-wise visibility, or use explicit 3D reconstruction, which provides fine-grained evidence but is costly to maintain over long rollouts. We propose Coverage-Maximizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (COVRAG), a depth-based memory retrieval framework that uses pretrained 3D priors to construct a target-view coverage map as lightweight 3D memory evidence. For frame selection, COVRAG maximizes residual coverage gain, iteratively retrieving frames that explain target-view regions not covered by the current context or previously selected memories. To improve scalability in long-video generation, we introduce sliding-window depth caching for efficient geometry estimation. Experiments on RealEstate10K and DL3DV10K show that COVRAG improves long-horizon geometric consistency while maintaining low latency compared to baselines.

</details>


### [283] [Places in the Wild: A Large, High-Resolution RAW Photograph Dataset for Ecologically Valid Vision Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02481)
*Michelle R. Greene*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Places in the Wild是一个包含67,574张高分辨率照片的数据集，采集于810个物理地点，涵盖260个基础级别场景类别（包括室内、城市和自然环境），每地点使用4500万像素Canon EOS R5在全景三脚架上拍摄72张水平间隔5度的图像及12张不同仰角图像，同时记录14位RAW和JPEG格式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大规模图像数据集多为低分辨率、来源不明的网络JPEG图像，缺乏空间上下文和已知的拍摄条件，限制了认知神经科学和计算机视觉研究的准确性和可重复性。

Method: 使用安装在华莱士全景云台上的4500万像素佳能EOS R5相机，在每个地点以5度水平间隔拍摄72张照片，以不同仰角拍摄12张照片，共计84张，覆盖360度视野。全部图像同时保存为14位RAW（CR3）格式和压缩JPEG格式，并附带完整EXIF元数据和图像质量指标。

Result: 构建了包含81,054,528兆像素数据量的高分辨率场景数据集，涵盖810个物理位置和260个基础级别场景类别，保留了传感器级细节，可用于分析亮度、对比度、颜色及其他图像统计数据。

Conclusion: 该数据集支持人类和模型的视角依赖识别研究、在真实条件下训练和评估场景理解系统、自然场景统计特征表征，以及需要近全视野视觉显示的实验，为认知神经科学和计算机视觉提供了重要的基准资源。

Abstract: Large image datasets have accelerated progress in cognitive neuroscience and computer vision. However, most datasets are low-resolution, internet-sourced JPEGs with unknown capture conditions and limited spatial context. Places in the Wild is a dataset of 67,574 high-resolution photographs collected in situ across 810 physical locations spanning 260 basic-level scene categories, including indoor, urban, and natural environments. At each location, a 45-megapixel Canon EOS R5 mounted on a panoramic tripod captured 72 images at 5-degree horizontal intervals plus 12 images at varying elevations, yielding dense 360-degree viewpoint sampling. All images were recorded simultaneously as 14-bit RAW (CR3) files and compressed JPEGs, preserving sensor-level detail for analyses of luminance, contrast, color, and other image statistics. The dataset is accompanied by complete EXIF metadata and a suite of image-quality metrics. Places in the Wild supports research on viewpoint-dependent recognition in humans and models, training and evaluation of scene-understanding systems under realistic conditions, characterization of natural scene statistics, and experiments requiring near-full-field visual displays.

</details>


### [284] [X-Stream: Exploring MLLMs as Multiplexers for Multi-Stream Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02482)
*Peiwen Sun,Xudong Lu,Huadai Liu,Yang Bo,Dongming Wu,Huankang Guan,Minghong Cai,Jinpeng Chen,Xintong Guo,Shuhan Li,Rui Liu,Xiangyu Yue*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: X-Stream是首个多流streaming理解基准测试数据集，包含4220个QA对和932个视频，涵盖11个子任务，评估多窗口/多视角/多设备场景。研究还提出将多模态大模型视为朴素多路复用器的理论框架，并通过实验揭示当前模型在并发流处理上存在显著不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有video streaming基准测试局限于单流范式，无法满足现实应用场景（如live sports、autonomous driving、multi-screen collaboration）对连续、跨stream推理的评估需求，存在关键研究空白。

Method: 1）设计双验证pipeline构建数据集，防止过度依赖单一stream；2）提出Signal Multiplexing Theory，从理论角度系统评估MLLMs作为朴素多路复用器的性能；3）开展大规模在线推理实验。

Result: 最先进的多模态大语言模型在处理并发stream时表现挣扎，仅获约50%的分数，且展现出较差的proactive能力，暴露出当前多路复用方案的显著局限。

Conclusion: X-Stream揭示了现有技术的trade-off，为下一代多流agent提供了实践评估协议和实证指导，有望推动multi-stream理解领域的后续研究。

Abstract: While video streaming understanding has made significant strides, real-world applications, such as live sports broadcasting, autonomous driving, and multi-screen collaboration, inherently demand continuous, multi-stream interactions. However, existing benchmarks are confined to single-stream paradigms, leaving a critical gap in evaluating online, cross-stream reasoning. To bridge this, we introduce X-Stream, the first benchmark dedicated to multi-stream streaming understanding. Comprising 4,220 rigorously curated QA pairs across 932 videos, X-Stream evaluates 11 subtasks across multi-window, multi-view, and multi-device scenarios. Crucially, our dataset is constructed using a novel dual-verification pipeline that prevents over-reliance on a single stream. Furthermore, we pioneer the conceptualization of multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) as naive multiplexers, systematically evaluating their performance through the lens of Signal Multiplexing Theory. Our extensive online inference experiments reveal a stark reality: state-of-the-art MLLMs struggle significantly with concurrent streams, achieving only about 50% score and exhibiting poor proactive ability. Ultimately, X-Stream exposes the trade-off of current multiplexing schemes, providing both a practical evaluation protocol and empirical guidance for next-generation multi-stream agents.

</details>


### [285] [MORPHOS: Autoregressive 4D Generation with Temporal Structured Latents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02491)
*Minkyung Kwon,Jinhyeok Choi,Youngjin Shin,Jaeyeong Kim,JongMin Lee,Seungryong Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MORPHOS是一种新颖的自回归框架，能从视频中生成动态3D资产，支持多种表示形式（网格、3D高斯、体绘制场）。核心创新在于提出T-SLAT统一4D表示方法，通过因果注意机制处理时间维度，在长视频生成中保持拓扑变化和时序一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法的局限性：1）仅支持单一表示形式，缺乏泛化能力；2）难以建模拓扑变化；3）在长视频中无法保持时序一致性。这些问题限制了动态3D资产生成的实用性和鲁棒性。

Method: 核心方法包括：1）提出T-SLAT（时序结构潜在表示），统一编码几何和外观的时序信息；2）采用因果注意机制进行自回归生成，每帧基于前序历史条件生成；3）引入时序结构增强策略减少误差累积。

Result: 在多个基准测试中达到最先进的外观渲染性能，几何重建取得有竞争力的结果，展现了对不同表示形式的出色泛化能力和长时序生成的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: MORPHOS通过创新的T-SLAT表示和自回归生成架构，成功解决了拓扑变化建模和时序一致性维护的核心挑战，为动态3D资产生成提供了统一且鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: We present MORPHOS, a novel autoregressive framework that generates dynamic 3D assets from videos across diverse representations, including meshes, 3D Gaussians, and radiance fields. Existing methods are typically limited to a single representation, struggle to model topological changes, or fail to maintain temporal consistency over long videos. To address these limitations, we introduce the Temporal Structured Latents (T-SLAT), a unified 4D representation that jointly encodes geometry and appearance along the temporal dimension. Leveraging T-SLAT, MORPHOS autoregressively generates dynamic 3D assets via causal attention, conditioning each frame on its preceding history to ensure temporal consistency while handling evolving topologies. We also propose a temporal-structural augmentation to mitigate error accumulation in autoregressive generation. MORPHOS achieves state-of-the-art performance in appearance and competitive results in geometry across multiple benchmarks, demonstrating superior generalization across various representations and robustness in long-horizon generation.

</details>


### [286] [GloResNet: A lightweight 3D CNN with global topological features for preterm brain injury prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02498)
*Boyu Yuan,Jiamiao Lu,Weichuan Zhang,Benqing Wu,Tuo Wang,Changshan Wang,Changming Sun,Liang Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出GloResNet框架，基于轻量级3D CNN (ResNet-10)预测早产儿脑损伤，通过全局流形映射策略处理T2加权MRI，实现75.18%平均准确率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早产儿脑损伤(BI)是导致神经发育障碍的主要原因，目前缺乏有效的非侵入性筛查工具，数据稀缺问题限制了深度学习模型的应用

Method: 构建基于ResNet-10的轻量级3D CNN(GloResNet)，使用MedicalNet预训练解决数据稀缺；全局流形映射将3D体积重采样至128×128×128并应用z-score强度归一化；训练集成mixup、类别加权和测试时增强；5折交叉验证评估

Result: 5折交叉验证中GloResNet达到75.18%平均准确率(峰值81.82%)，特异性0.81，灵敏度0.76

Conclusion: 拓扑感知的轻量级CNN能有效预测新生儿脑损伤，为临床提供非侵入性筛查工具，具有应用潜力

Abstract: This study introduces an automated deep learning framework for predicting brain injury (BI) in preterm infants from T2-weighted MRI (dHCP dataset). We propose GloResNet, a lightweight 3D CNN based on ResNet-10, pretrained on MedicalNet to address data scarcity. A global manifold mapping strategy first resamples each 3D volume to 128x128x128 and then applies subject-wise z-score intensity normalization, thereby preserving global topology while standardizing appearance. Training integrates mixup, class weighting, and test-time augmentation for robustness. In 5-fold cross-validation, GloResNet achieved 75.18% average accuracy (peak 81.82%), with specificity 0.81 and sensitivity 0.76. Results demonstrate that a topology-aware lightweight CNN has the capability to effectively predict neonatal BI, offering a non-invasive screening tool. The source code of this paper can be obtained from the GitHub repository: https://github.com/ICL-SUST/GloResNet-Preterm-Brain

</details>

### [289] [ToolFG: Towards Well-Grounded Fine-Grained Image Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02518)
*Yu Xue,Haoxuan Qu,Zhuoling Li,Yihang Lou,Yan Bai,Hossein Rahmani,Jun Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ToolFG是一个将工具集成到多模态大语言模型(MLLM)中的细粒度图像分类(FGIC)框架,通过让模型自主使用外部工具来收集可验证的视觉线索,以更可靠的方式区分高度相似的类别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 细粒度图像分类在现实中应用广泛,但现有方法难以可靠地区分高度相似的类别。该研究旨在探索一种新范式,让MLLM能够主动使用外部工具进行推理,收集可验证的视觉线索,从而更准确地进行细粒度分类。

Method: 提出两个核心技术:(1)MCTS引导的工具使用知识蒸馏机制,从高级专有MLLM中挖掘工具使用和FGIC相关知识用于模型训练;(2)模型-工具协同演化机制,联合优化工具集和模型的工具使用策略,推动它们向协同适应和专业化的FGIC状态发展。

Result: 进行了大量实验验证框架的有效性。

Conclusion: ToolFG是首个专门为FGIC设计的工具集成MLLM框架,为细粒度图像分类提供了新的解决思路。

Abstract: Fine-grained image classification (FGIC) has broad applications and has attracted significant research attention. In this paper, we explore a novel paradigm for solving FGIC by proposing \textbf{{ToolFG}}, the first tool-integrated MLLM-based framework tailored to FGIC. ToolFG enables MLLMs to autonomously and flexibly use external tools during the reasoning process, actively interact with images, and collect verifiable visual cues for distinguishing highly similar categories in a more \textit{{reliable}} and \textit{{well-grounded}} manner. To equip the model with such tool-use ability, we design a novel \textbf{{MCTS-guided tool-use knowledge distillation mechanism}}, which effectively mines tool-use- and FGIC-relevant knowledge from advanced proprietary MLLMs for model training. Furthermore, we propose a \textbf{{model-tool co-evolution mechanism}} that jointly refines the toolset and the model's tool-use policy, driving them toward a mutually adapted and FGIC-specialized state. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework.

</details>

### [292] [LongLive-RAG: A General Retrieval-Augmented Framework for Long Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02553)
*Qixin Hu,Shuai Yang,Wei Huang,Song Han,Yukang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出LongLive-RAG框架，将长视频生成重新表述为检索增强生成问题。通过将已生成的latent作为可搜索的历史记忆，而非仅依赖滑动窗口，使模型能够在生成长视频时访问非局部上下文。引入窗时间Delta Loss来增强检索的区分度，减少错误累积。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归视频扩散虽然支持可变长度合成，但长时序生成存在误差累积和身份漂移问题。现有方法采用滑动窗口注意力，导致一旦窗口内积累 appearance errors，后续生成只能基于退化轨迹继续进行，形成不可逆的错误累积路径。

Method: LongLive-RAG包含三个核心组件：1)将已生成的latent建模为动态可搜索的历史记忆库；2)在每个新block使用query embedding检索相关历史latent；3)提出Window Temporal Delta Loss抑制冗余局部相似性，鼓励embedding捕获有意义的时序变化。

Result: 在多个自回归 backbone 和不同生成长度上实现提升的长视频质量，获得最佳的VBench-Long平均排名。相比纯生成，检索步骤只带来很小开销。

Conclusion: LongLive-RAG是首个将自生成latent历史建模为内容可寻址检索记忆的开环自回归长视频生成方法，为解决长视频生成中的误差累积提供了新思路。

Abstract: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion enables variable-length synthesis, but long-horizon generation often suffers from accumulated errors and identity drift. For efficiency, existing methods commonly adopt sliding-window attention during generation. This creates an irreversible generation trajectory: once the active window accumulates appearance errors, subsequent generations can only condition on this degraded trajectory and drift further away. We address this limitation by formulating long video generation as a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) problem. Rather than relying solely on the recent window, we treat previously generated latents as a dynamic, searchable history. We propose LongLive-RAG, a general retrieval framework for AR video generation. At each new block, LongLive-RAG uses a query embedding to retrieve relevant historical latents. This lightweight retrieval step adds only a small overhead relative to generation and lets the generator condition on non-local context instead of only the recent window. To make retrieval more discriminative, we introduce the Window Temporal Delta Loss that suppresses redundant local similarity and encourages embeddings to capture meaningful temporal changes. Together, these components help reduce error accumulation caused by sliding-window attention. Experiments across multiple AR backbones and generation lengths show improved long-video quality and the best average VBench-Long rank. To our knowledge, among open-ended AR long video generation methods, LongLive-RAG is the first to formulate self-generated latent history as content-addressable retrieval memory. Code is available at https://github.com/qixinhu11/LongLive-RAG.

</details>

### [297] [From Zero to Hero: Training-Free Custom Concept Spawning in World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02575)
*Kiymet Akdemir,Pinar Yanardag*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SPAWN方法，实现概念生成功能，允许用户在自回归世界模型中插入指定的视觉概念（如角色、道具、建筑等），无需训练即可完成场景可控合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归世界模型在用户导航至初始帧可视区域外时，无法控制未可见区域的场景内容。这限制了游戏、互动叙事和模拟等需要可控场景合成的应用场景，作者将此缺失能力定义为"概念生成"。

Method: SPAWN利用图像到视频模型的结构特性：上下文内存的第一个槽位被固定在参考帧上，作为所有生成块的基础锚点。通过在短注入窗口期间将此锚点与外部概念潜码进行交换，然后让原始锚点返回，使概念能够通过模型自身记忆自然传播。支持概念图像或文本描述作为输入。

Result: 实验表明SPAWN能够以一致的照明、尺度和透视整合概念，同时保持身份和时间一致性。从细粒度实体（角色、道具）到大规模元素（建筑、地标）均可适用。

Conclusion: 证明了在现有自回归世界模型中，无需任何训练即可实现可控的概念生成功能。

Abstract: Autoregressive world models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for interactive video generation, allowing users to navigate dynamically generated environments through actions. These models are typically conditioned on a text prompt and/or a single reference frame, from which the entire world is generated. Yet the moment the user navigates beyond what is visible in that frame, the unseen regions are populated by the base model's priors, with no mechanism for the user to specify what should appear and where. This is a fundamental limitation for applications such as gaming, interactive storytelling, and simulation, where controllable scene composition is essential. We refer to this missing capability as concept spawning; introducing a user-specified visual concept into a world model, analogous to spawning in a game engine. We introduce SPAWN (Swapping Pinned Anchor with Windowed iNjection), a training-free method for concept spawning. SPAWN exploits a structural property of image-to-video backbones: the first slot of the context memory is pinned to the reference frame and acts as a foundational anchor for every generated chunk. By swapping this anchor with an external concept latent over a short injection window and letting the original anchor return, we cause the concept to propagate naturally through the rollout via the model's own memory. SPAWN supports concepts from fine-grained entities such as characters and props to large-scale elements such as buildings and landmarks, and accepts either a concept image or a text description as input. Experiments show that SPAWN integrates concepts with consistent lighting, scale, and perspective while preserving identity and temporal coherence, demonstrating that controllable concept spawning is achievable in existing autoregressive world models without any training.

</details>


### [298] [ProtoAda: Prototype-Guided Adaptive Adapter Expansion and Geometric Consolidation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02576)
*Yu-Cheng Shi,Zhen-Hao Xie,Jun-Tao Tang,Da-Wei Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出ProtoAda框架，解决多模态持续指令调优中任务分配问题。传统方法仅基于图像-文本相似度路由，导致语义相似但输出格式不同的任务被错误分配给同一专家，引发梯度干扰。ProtoAda引入格式感知任务原型，使任务分配同时考虑语义和输出结构，并通过几何感知方式整合格式兼容的更新。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态大型语言模型通过指令调优获得良好性能，但实际部署需要持续学习新能力。现有稀疏架构方法（如LoRA专家混合）仅利用图像-文本相似度进行路由，忽略了任务输出结构的差异。语义相似但响应格式不同的任务（如需要坐标预测的定位任务与短文本回答的VQA任务）会被错误路由到同一专家，导致梯度干扰和专家协作失效。

Method: 提出ProtoAda原型引导自适应调优框架：1）引入格式感知任务原型，对齐任务分配同时考虑语义和输出结构；2）以几何感知方式整合格式兼容的更新，有效复用并渐进优化现有参数。

Result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，ProtoAda实现优越性能，尤其在答案是构容易被顺序调优破坏的任务上表现突出。

Conclusion: ProtoAda通过格式感知任务原型有效解决了多模态持续指令调优中的任务路由问题，显著减少了任务间干扰并促进了专家协作，为MLLM的持续学习提供了新思路。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance through instruction tuning, but real-world deployment requires them to continually acquire new vision-language capabilities, making Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) essential. To reduce inter-task interference and promote collaboration, recent methods often employ sparse architectures like Mixture of LoRA Experts with image-text similarity routing. However, tasks with distinct response structures could share highly similar visual-linguistic semantics and thus be wrongly routed to the same expert; image-text similarity alone is insufficient for reliable task assignment. For example, an expert in a grounding task requiring coordinate prediction may be biased toward producing short textual answers after learning semantically similar VQA tasks. This format-blind task assignment integrates heterogeneous response types into shared parameters, inducing gradient interference and ineffective expert collaboration. To address this problem, we propose ProtoAda, a prototype-guided adaptive tuning framework. ProtoAda introduces format-aware task prototypes to align task assignment and routing with both task semantics and output structure, and further consolidates format-compatible updates in a geometry-aware manner to effectively reuse and progressively refine existing parameters. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that ProtoAda achieves superior performance, especially on tasks whose answer structures are easily corrupted by sequential tuning.

</details>

### [302] [Scaling Behavior of Single LLM-Driven Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00655)
*Jialing Li,Zhouhong Gu,Yin Cai,Hongwei Feng*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了基于大语言模型的多智能体系统(MAS)在agent数量增加时的性能Scaling规律。通过提出SIMAS框架(顺序迭代多智能体系统),隔离了协作变量与模型异质性。研究发现:MAS性能并不会随着agent数量单调递增,而是呈现递减回报模式,受协作协同与协调开销之间的权衡支配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 新兴的LLM-based多智能体系统有潜力通过协作智能解决复杂任务,但关于其Scaling行为和内在集体动力学的基础性问题尚未被充分探索。需要从模型异质性或知识异质性中分离出协作变量的影响。

Method: 提出了SIMAS框架,一种以顺序智能体间通信为中心的极简架构,以便清晰地观察Scaling效应。在不同任务和模型规模下进行了广泛实验。

Result: MAS性能不会随agent数量单调递增,而是遵循递减回报模式,受协作协同与协调开销之间的权衡支配。研究还发现:(1)有效的MAS需要足够强大的基础LLM;(2)任务类型严重调制最优agent数量;(3)集体智能是依赖于战略性交互设计的涌现属性,而非智能体多元化的必然结果;(4)性能下降源于协调开销,而非仅仅是长上下文失败;(5)Scaling趋势在不同交互架构(如结构化辩论拓扑)中具有普遍性。

Conclusion: 本工作提供了MASScaling规律的基础理解,为设计高效协作系统提供了实践指导,并挑战了"更多智能体必然带来更好性能"這一 prevailing假设。有效MAS设计需要战略性交互设计,而非简单增加智能体数量。

Abstract: The burgeoning field of LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) promises to tackle complex tasks through collaborative intelligence, yet fundamental questions regarding their scaling behavior and intrinsic collective dynamics remain underexplored. This paper systematically investigates how the performance of a homogeneous MAS evolves as the number of agents increases, isolating the variable of collaboration from model or knowledge heterogeneity. We propose the Sequential Iterative Multi-Agent System (SIMAS) framework, a minimalist architecture centered on sequential inter-agent communication, to clearly observe scaling effects. Through extensive experiments across diverse tasks and model scales, we establish that MAS performance does not scale monotonically with agent count but follows a pattern of diminishing returns, governed by a trade-off between collaborative synergy and coordination overhead. Our findings reveal that effective MAS requires a sufficiently capable base LLM, that task type critically modulates the optimal agent count, and that collective intelligence is an emergent property contingent on strategic interaction design rather than a guaranteed outcome of agent plurality. The performance degradation stems coordination overhead rather than merely long-context failure, and the scaling tendency generalizes across interaction architectures like structured debate topologies. This work provides a foundational understanding of MAS scaling laws, offering practical guidance for designing efficient collaborative systems and challenging the prevailing assumption that more agents invariably lead to better performance.

</details>


### [303] [Dynamic Coordination Strategy Selection for Enterprise Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00804)
*Thanh Luong Tuan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 该研究评估企业多智能体系统中四种协调策略（共识、辩论、综合、单智能体工作流）的效果，通过1440个输出样本比较不同模型在不同任务类型和执行条件下的表现，发现精确最优策略不稳定，但近最优路由策略可靠，建议采用动态路由作为校准默认策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业多智能体系统暴露多种协调模式，但缺乏证据指导何时使用哪种策略（共识、辩论、综合或单智能体工作流），部署时无法确定是按问题类别动态选择还是全局固定协调策略。

Method: 采用冻结矩阵实验设计：30项企业任务×6个行业×5个问题类别×4种执行条件×3次重复×4个模型臂（qwen_local、sonnet、gemma_openrouter及OpenAI云验证臂），共1440个输出，由固定Sonnet评估标准评判。

Result: 原始严格假设H1未获支持：精确获胜者身份在各模型间不稳定，多个预测策略接近但未超越最佳替代方案。但近最优路由主张强获支持：在所有预注册模型臂和问题类别中，预测策略均在最佳条件的0.10质量分以内。结构化合规验证是原映射的明显例外：所有模型臂都偏好single_agent而非consensus。H2未获支持：越南语和英语领域任务的协调条件排名一致性无显著差异（两层Kendall's W均为0.20，符号秩p=.85）。

Conclusion: 企业协调策略应使用动态路由作为校准默认，而非确定性最优选择法则。单智能体工作流在合规验证场景中优于共识机制。

Abstract: Enterprise multi-agent systems increasingly expose multiple coordination patterns, but deployments often lack evidence for when to use consensus, debate, synthesis, or a simpler single-agent workflow. This paper evaluates whether coordination strategy should be selected dynamically by problem class rather than fixed globally. We run a frozen matrix of 30 enterprise tasks spanning six industries, five problem classes, four execution conditions, three replications per cell, and four model arms: qwen_local, sonnet, gemma_openrouter, and an auxiliary openai cloud-validation arm. All 1,440 generated outputs are judged by a fixed Sonnet rubric.
  The main finding is bounded and operationally useful, but it is not the original strict H1. The pre-registered exact-winner/CI criterion is not supported: exact winner identity is unstable across model arms, and several predicted strategies are close to, but not above, the best observed alternative. A weaker near-best routing claim is strongly supported. In every pre-registered model arm and problem class, and again in the auxiliary OpenAI validation arm, the predicted strategy is within 0.10 quality-score points of the best observed condition. Structured compliance verification is the clearest exception to the original mapping: all arms favor single_agent rather than consensus. A pre-registered Kendall's W test finds no reliable difference between Vietnamese-domain and English-domain tasks in how consistently the four coordination conditions are ranked (mean W of 0.20 in both strata; signed-rank p = .85), so H2 is not supported. We conclude that enterprise coordination policy should use dynamic routing as a calibrated default, not as a deterministic winner-selection law.

</details>


### [304] [FinCom: A Financial Multi-Agent Demo with Disagree-or-Commit Deliberation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00939)
*Chao Peter Yang,Zixiao Tan,Kaisen Yao,Ziyu Zhou,Eleanor Jiang,Michael Wu*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 提出了FinCom框架，通过"不同意或承诺"(DoC)协议，在金融AI委员会中嵌入结构化异议机制，解决多智能体系统中的谄媚问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有金融多智能体协调方案尤其是强调共识或辩论的方法容易产生谄媚现象，智能体会顺从同伴推理而非证据，导致过早达成一致和结果退化。

Method: FinCom框架包含一个监督器和三个ReAct驱动的专业智能体(研究、定量、风险)，每个智能体配备角色特定工具。在审议过程中，智能体在接受同伴推理前必须明确表达批评意见或做出承诺。

Result: 在最新的金融智能体基准测试和90个内部手工金融任务上，采用LLM作为评判者协议进行的评估显示，文档编排(Document)在内部和外部评估集上都显著优于以达成共识为目标的基线方法，提升了推理准确性和风险感知能力。

Conclusion: 通过将分歧重新概念化为治理的基本元素而非干扰噪声，FinCom提供了一种最小化的、仅需提示的解决方案，增强了金融agent系统的问责制、透明度和认知鲁棒性。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems powered by large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for financial analysis and decision support. However, existing coordination schemes, especially those emphasizing consensus or debate, are vulnerable to sycophancy: agents conform to peer reasoning instead of evidence, leading to premature agreement and degraded outcomes. We introduce FinCom (Financial Committee), a governed multi-agent framework and interactive system that operationalizes the Disagree-or-Commit (DoC) protocol to embed structured dissent into financial AI committees. A central Supervisor orchestrates three ReAct-enabled specialist agents: Research, Quantitative, and Risk. Each agent is equipped with role-specific tools for retrieval, computation, and stress testing. During deliberation, agents must either explicitly critique or commit to their peers' reasoning before converging on a unified recommendation.
  This demonstration showcases how FinCom supports committee-style financial analysis through coordinated multi-agent interaction, including structured report generation and interactive decision support. Evaluated across the most recent financial agent benchmark, in addition to 90 internal handcrafted financial tasks using an LLM-as-a-Judge protocol, DoC improves reasoning accuracy and risk awareness significantly over a consensus-seeking baseline on both an in-house and external evaluation set. By reframing disagreement as a governance primitive rather than noise, FinCom offers a lightweight, prompt-only recipe for improving accountability, transparency, and epistemic robustness in agentic financial systems.

</details>


### [305] [Coordinating Task Switching in a Robotics Multi-Agent System Using Behavior Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01170)
*Lucas Haug,Anarosa Alves Franco Brandão,Arthur Casals*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文介绍了ThundeRatz团队在IEEE Very Small Soccer(VSSS)机器人足球赛中采用行为树(BT)实现多机器人协作的方法，并与之前使用的有限状态机(FSM)方法进行比较评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VSSS比赛中，两队各三台机器人在动态环境中进行足球比赛，机器人之间的协调对于获胜至关重要。需要一种有效的多机器人协作策略来提升团队竞争力。

Method: 提出基于行为树的多机器人协调方法，使用FIRASim仿真器进行对比实验，并在实际学术机器人竞赛中验证性能。

Result: 通过FIRASim仿真器和实际比赛验证了行为树方法相较于FSM方法的性能和有效性提升。

Conclusion: 行为树方法可为VSSS等多机器人系统提供有效的协调方案，值得进一步推广和应用。

Abstract: The application of multi-agent systems in robotics is a very challenging field. Several competitions involving such systems are proposed to foster research and development of strategies and mechanisms using games as the underlying domain. Among them are the ones from the \textit{{IEEE Very Small Soccer (VSSS)}} category, which is the case study described in this paper. In VSSS, two teams of three robots each compete in a very dynamic environment of a soccer game. Thus, coordination of robots' behavior during the game is crucial to win it. In this paper, we present a Behavior-Tree-based approach to support multi-robot coordination within the VSSS team of the ThundeRatz robotics team from the Universidade de S$\tilde{{a}}$o Paulo. Moreover, a comparison between the proposed approach and the previous one, which was based on a Finite State Machine (FSM), was conducted using the FIRASim simulator. Besides that, the performance of this new strategy was further evaluated in an academic robotics competition.

</details>


### [306] [Multi-Agent Computer Use](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01533)
*Jing Yu Koh,Ruslan Salakhutdinov,Daniel Fried*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出多智能体计算机使用(MACU)系统，采用管理器将任务分解为有向无环图(DAG)，并行执行子智能体并持续修订计划。实验表明在OSWorld、Online-Mind2Web、WebTailBench和Odysseys基准上比单智能体基线提升3.4-25.5%，在长视野任务上提速约1.5倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前计算机使用智能体(CUA)主要为单智能体串行部署，这种设置对于需要任务分解、并行执行和基于新信息持续重规划的复杂长视野任务效果不佳，存在明显局限性。

Method: 提出一种通用多智能体设置：管理器模型将计算机使用任务分解为DAG，编码相关依赖和子智能体目标；每次迭代中，管理器将并行CUA子智能体派往DAG就绪节点执行，并根据子智能体返回的新发现持续修订DAG（添加、取消或重写节点）。

Result: 在桌面(OSWorld)和网页导航(Online-Mind2Web、WebTailBench、Odysseys)基准上一致超越强单智能体基线3.4-25.5%；展示出更好的测试时扩展性；解决了单智能体CUAs无法完成的复杂长视野任务；在Odysseys上平均任务完成 wall-clock时间提升约1.5倍。

Conclusion: 多智能体协调是扩展计算机使用智能体以更高效、更持久工作的一个有前景的发展方向。

Abstract: Computer use agents (CUAs) today are primarily deployed as single serial agents. This setup is suboptimal for complex long-horizon tasks that benefit from task decomposition, parallel execution, and consistent re-planning based on new information. In this paper, we argue that we should instead move towards evaluating and building multi-agent computer use (MACU) systems. These systems, which emphasize planning and parallel execution, alleviate many of the shortcomings of single-agent CUAs. We propose a general multi-agent setup in which a manager model decomposes computer use tasks as a directed acyclic graph (DAG), encoding relevant dependencies and goals for subagents. At each iteration, the manager dispatches parallel CUA subagents to carry out nodes on the ready frontier of the DAG, and continuously revises the DAG (adding, canceling, or rewriting nodes) as new findings arrive from subagents. This design treats the partially observable environment of computer use as a first class challenge: information that downstream agents may not be able to re-observe are retained and passed forward through the manager and DAG structure. We demonstrate that MACU consistently improves over strong single-agent baselines by $3.4-25.5\%$ on desktop (OSWorld) and web navigation (Online-Mind2Web, WebTailBench, Odysseys) benchmarks, exhibits more favorable test-time scaling, and solves complex long-horizon tasks where single-agent CUAs get stuck. On Odysseys, a long-horizon web navigation benchmark, MACU improves average task completion wall-clock time by ${{\sim}} 1.5 \times$, demonstrating its efficacy in speeding up traditionally slow CUA pipelines. Our findings highlight that multi-agent coordination is a promising axis for scaling computer use agents to work productively for longer and more effectively. We release all code and interactive visualizations at https://jykoh.com/multi-agent-computer-use.

</details>


### [307] [Agent System Operations: Categorization, Challenges, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01581)
*Zexin Wang,Changhua Pei,Yuanhao Liu,Jingjing Li,Yintong Huo,Quan Zhou,Haotian Si,Hang Cui,Zihan Liu,Gaogang Xie,Fei Sun,Dan Pei,David Lo*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: Summary generation failed


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable

Method: Method extraction failed

Result: Result analysis unavailable

Conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

Abstract: As the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to advance, LLM-based agent systems offer advantages in flexibility and interpretability over traditional systems, garnering increasing attention. However, despite the widespread research interest and industrial application of agent systems, these systems, like their traditional counterparts, frequently encounter anomalies. These anomalies lead to instability and insecurity, hindering their further development. Therefore, a comprehensive and systematic approach to the operation and maintenance of agent systems is urgently needed. Unfortunately, current research on the operations of agent systems is sparse. To address this gap, we have undertaken a survey on agent system operations with the aim of establishing a clear framework for the field, defining the challenges, and facilitating further development. Specifically, this paper begins by systematically defining anomalies within agent systems, categorizing them into intra-agent anomalies and inter-agent anomalies. Next, we introduce a novel and comprehensive operational framework for agent systems, dubbed Agent System Operations (AgentOps). We provide detailed definitions and explanations of its four key stages: monitoring, anomaly detection, root cause localization, and resolution.

</details>


### [308] [MetaForge: A Self-Evolving Multimodal Agent that Retrieves, Adapts, and Forges Tools On Demand](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01801)
*Shouang Wei,Houcheng Min,Xinpeng Dong,Xin Lin,Sen Cui,Bo Jiang,Zhongxiang Dai,Kun Kuang,Guandong Xu,Fei Wu,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: MetaForge是一个多模态智能体框架，通过"决定-检索-适应-锻造"四阶段闭环实现按需工具调用和工具集自我进化，超越静态工具库范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决两大局限：静态预定义工具无法泛化到新场景，以及无差别调用工具导致冗余成本和噪声错误。

Method: 将智能体行为解耦为四阶段：判断是否需要工具(Decide)、选择合适工具(Retrieve)、将工具参数落地到任务上下文(Adapt)、在线合成新技能并回收利用(Forge)。通过强化学习联合优化调用必要性、检索准确性、执行有效性和锻造技能可重用性，并引入显式调用成本惩罚。

Result: 在12个基准测试上，MetaForge在准确性、效率和泛化方面一致超越16个基线方法。

Conclusion: 验证了从静态工具库存到按需自我进化的范式转变，为多模态智能体在复杂推理任务中的工具使用提供了新方向。

Abstract: Multimodal agents have achieved notable progress on complex reasoning tasks through tool use, yet remain limited by two issues: statically predefined tool inventories fail to generalize to unseen scenarios, and indiscriminate tool invocation incurs redundant cost and noise-induced errors. We propose MetaForge, a multimodal agent framework that learns when to invoke tools and how to evolve its toolset on demand. MetaForge factorizes agentic behavior into four coupled stages: Decide (judging whether tool use is warranted), Retrieve (selecting suitable tools), Adapt (grounding tool parameters in task context), and Forge (synthesizing new skills online and recycling them into the tool library for reuse), forming a closed judge-retrieve-adapt-forge-recycle loop. A unified orchestration policy enables the agent to choose among answering directly, reusing existing tools, or forging new ones. We jointly optimize invocation necessity, retrieval accuracy, execution effectiveness, and forged-skill reusability via reinforcement learning, with an explicit invocation-cost penalty discouraging redundant calls. Across 12 benchmarks, MetaForge consistently surpasses 16 baselines in accuracy, efficiency, and generalization, validating a paradigm shift from static tool inventories to on-demand self-evolution.

</details>


### [309] [Dynamic Trust-Aware Sparse Communication Topology for LLM-Based Multi-Agent Consensus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01828)
*Wanshuang Gou,Zihan Liu*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出DySCo（动态稀疏共识），一种面向大语言模型多代理系统的动态信任感知稀疏共识机制，通过基于可靠性、答案分歧和任务相关性的边值估计，选择高价值通信边，在预算约束下实现按需通信而非全广播，从而降低通信开销同时保持跨验证信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全连接多代理辩论框架的通信成本随地加数 Agents 近似二次增长；固定稀疏拓扑虽降低成本但无法适应不同任务实例或中间推理状态，常保留低价值交互或丢失关键纠错信息。

Method: DySCo 在每轮推理中根据代理可靠性、答案分歧度和任务相关性估计通信边价值，在预算约束下筛选少量高价值边进行消息交换；通过动态信任权重聚合不同代理答案；当共识稳定时提前终止讨论。

Result: DySCo 在数学推理、逻辑推理和事实问答任务上评估，降低通信开销的同时保留了必要的跨验证信息。

Conclusion: DySCo 为平衡LLM多代理系统的效率和准确性提供了有效方案，具有应用潜力。

Abstract: Large language model-driven multi-agent systems enhance the reliability of complex reasoning tasks through multi-round deliberation, role specialization, and cross-validation. However, existing multi-agent debate and collaboration frameworks typically adopt fully connected communication, causing the number of messages, token costs, and end-to-end latency to grow approximately quadratically with the number of agents; although fixed sparse topologies reduce overhead, they cannot adapt communication relationships to different task instances or intermediate reasoning states, making them prone either to preserving low-value interactions or to losing critical error-correction information. To address this problem, this paper proposes DySCo (Dynamic Sparse Consensus), a dynamic trust-aware sparse consensus mechanism. In each round of reasoning, DySCo estimates the value of communication edges based on agent reliability, answer divergence, and task relevance, and selects a small number of high-value edges for message exchange under budget constraints; it then aggregates the answers of different agents through dynamic trust weights and terminates the discussion early once consensus stabilizes. This mechanism replaces universal broadcasting with on-demand communication, thereby reducing communication overhead while preserving essential cross-validation information. We further present analyses of communication complexity and consensus stability, and evaluate the performance of DySCo on mathematical reasoning, logical reasoning, and factual question-answering tasks.

</details>


### [310] [From Global Policies to Local Strategies: Multi-Objective Optimization of Resource-Specific Handover Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01857)
*Lukas Kirchdorfer,Artemis Doumeni,Han van der Aa,Hugo A. López*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本论文提出首个多目标资源级决策优化方法，结合多智能体系统流程模拟器与多智能体进化算法，生成帕累托最优的资源特定策略，优化流程成本和等待时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 业务流程管理中的高效资源配置是关键挑战，直接影响成本、吞吐时间和利用率。现有强化学习方法通常忽略影响实际任务交接的资源间协作模式，因此需要开发考虑协作感知的优化方法来改进流程绩效。

Method: 将现有的多智能体系统流程模拟器与多目标进化算法相结合，产生帕累托最优的、资源特定的策略，在多个目标上优化流程性能。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法平均降低37%的成本和58%的等待时间，持续优于启发式基线方法。

Conclusion: 该方法验证了利用协作感知优化改进流程性能的潜力，是首个实现资源级决策多目标优化的方法，为人员特定交接策略推荐提供了新途径。

Abstract: Efficient resource allocation is a key challenge in business process management, with direct implications for cost, throughput time, and utilization. While recent Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches have shown promise in deriving adaptive allocation policies, they typically neglect inter-resource collaboration patterns that can strongly influence real-world task handovers. Recognizing this, this paper introduces the first approach for multi-objective optimization of resource-level decision-making, enabling the recommendation of person-specific handover policies. To achieve this, our work combines an existing Multi-Agent System-based process simulator with a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm. The resulting approach produces Pareto-optimal, resource-specific policies that optimize the process across multiple objectives. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets show that our approach reduces costs by an average of 37% and waiting time by 58%, consistently outperforming heuristic baselines and demonstrating the potential of leveraging collaboration-aware optimization to improve process performance.

</details>


### [311] [RadioMaster: Multi-Agent System for Autonomous Radio Signal Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01862)
*Jiazhen Lei,Tianze Cao,Yuxin Sha,Sihan Wang,Bingbing Wang,Fengyuan Zhu,Zeming Yang,Xiaohua Tian*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出RadioMaster，一个基于多代理系统的全自主框架，用于将用户意图直接转化为真实世界的无线信号发射，解决现有大语言模型在无线电领域知识不足和对物理硬件约束不敏感的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将用户意图转化为物理无线电信号是无线原型设计中的关键但繁琐的步骤，需要深入的物理层知识和面临巨大的实现挑战。虽然LLM和多代理系统已革新传统软件工程，但直接将它们应用于无线电信号生成存在严重领域知识缺乏和对物理硬件约束不敏感的问题，导致任务失败。

Method: 构建了RadioMaster框架，包含三个协同支柱：1) RadioWiki用于领域特定知识检索；2) RadioRadioAgent用于协作I/Q样本生成和硬件配置；3) RadioEmulator用于闭环物理层验证。同时构建了RadioBench，首个专门针对无线电信号生成领域的综合基准测试。

Result: 在实际部署中，RadioMaster在配置可行性和信号保真度方面显著优于最先进的基线方法，验证了所提框架的有效性。

Conclusion: RadioMaster成功实现了将用户意图端到端转化为真实世界无线信号发射的任务，通过多代理协作和领域特定知识检索克服了传统LLM在无线电领域的局限性，为自动化无线原型设计提供了新的研究方向。

Abstract: Translating user intents into physical radio signals represents the critical yet notoriously tedious final step in wireless prototyping, as it requires intricate knowledge of physical layer details and presents immense implementation challenges. Large Language Models (LLMs) and multi-agent systems have revolutionized conventional software engineering, raising the compelling question of whether they can resolve these formidable difficulties. However, our investigations reveal that current models experience significant limitations and fail to accomplish this task when applied to radio signal generation. This performance degradation primarily stems from severe domain ignorance and a fundamental insensitivity to physical hardware constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce RadioMaster, a fully autonomous multi-agent framework designed to seamlessly translate user input into real-world wireless emissions. RadioMaster operates on three synergistic pillars: RadioWiki for domain-specific knowledge retrieval, RadioAgent for collaborative I/Q sample generation alongside hardware configuration, and RadioEmulator for closed-loop physical layer verification. Furthermore, we construct RadioBench, the first comprehensive benchmark tailored specifically for the radio signal generation domain. Extensive real-world evaluations demonstrate that RadioMaster significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines regarding configuration viability and signal fidelity.

</details>


### [312] [QoEReasoner: An Agentic Reasoning Framework for Automated and Explainable QoE Diagnosis in RANs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01925)
*Qizhe Li,Haolong Chen,Shan Dai,Zhuo Li,Zhiwei Hu,Xuan Li,Guangxu Zhu,Qingjiang Shi*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出QoEReasoner，一个基于LLM的端到端代理系统，用于自动化可解释的QoE（体验质量）诊断。该系统通过确定性工具将原始KPI转化为结构化证据，利用领域知识库强制协议一致的故障传播，并借助历史案例库指导假设生成，从而解决了传统LLM在无线接入网络故障诊断中的数值时间序列分析失败、幻觉和状态严格性不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在运营无线接入网络（RAN）中诊断QoE降级是一项关键但极其复杂的任务，传统上需要劳动密集型的专家分析，涉及高维跨层遥测数据。虽然大型语言模型（LLM）提供前所未有的推理能力，但它们本质上不适合原始RAN故障排查：无法进行数值时间系列分析、产生违反协议的因果链接幻觉，且缺乏多步故障定位所需的状态严格性。

Method: QoERanasoner采用以下核心组件：（1）确定性工具将原始数值KPI可靠转换为结构化证据；（2）领域特定知识库强制协议一致的故障传播；（3）历史案例库引导假设生成；（4）状态化中央 planner协调异常检测、因果追踪和根因定位的闭环过程。

Result: 在真实运营RAN数据集上的评估表明，QoEReasoner在多个诊断任务上优于强基线方法18%-40%的准确率。此外，它将诊断时间从约30分钟的人工专家分析缩短至每会话仅3分钟，同时产生高度可解释的专家级报告，并在不同的LLM骨干上保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: QoEReasoner成功地将LLM的推理能力与确定性网络分析相结合，实现了自动化、可解释的QoE诊断，显著提升诊断效率并保持专家级别的准确性，为运营网络质量管理提供了有效的AI辅助解决方案。

Abstract: Diagnosing Quality-of-Experience (QoE) degradations in operational Radio Access Networks (RANs) is a critical but notoriously complex task, traditionally requiring labor-intensive expert analysis over high-dimensional, cross-layer telemetry. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer unprecedented reasoning capabilities, they are fundamentally unsuited for raw RANs troubleshooting: they fail at numeric time-series analysis, hallucinate protocol-violating causal links, and lack the stateful rigor required for multi-step fault localization. To bridge this gap, we present QoEReasoner, an end-to-end, LLM-driven agentic system designed for automated and explainable QoE diagnosis. QoEReasoner tames the inherent unpredictability of LLMs by grounding their reasoning in the physical realities of the network. It employs deterministic tools to reliably translate raw numeric KPIs into structured evidence, enforces protocol-consistent fault propagation through a domain-specific Knowledge Base, and leverages a Historical Bank of expert-validated cases to guide hypothesis generation. A stateful central planner orchestrates this closed-loop process across anomaly detection, causal tracing, and root-cause localization. Evaluations on real-world operational RANs datasets demonstrate that QoEReasoner outperforms strong baselines by 18\%-40\% in accuracy across multiple diagnostic tasks. Furthermore, it reduces diagnostic time from approximately 30 minutes of manual expert analysis to just 3 minutes per session, delivering highly interpretable, expert-grade reports while remaining robust across diverse LLM backbones.

</details>


### [313] [A Simple Hierarchical Causality Primer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01979)
*Tim Gebbie*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个形式化复杂系统中层次因果关系的框架，区分了行动者（实例化因果类）和代理（在特定组织层级实现局部动态）。核心贡献是引入三个必要结构：因果类（抽象因果影响形式）、聚合算子（跨层级操作）和离散事件-时间映射（关联局部事件计数与全局时钟）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有理论缺乏对复杂系统中层次因果关系的正式形式化框架。传统方法未能清晰区分行动者（作为因果类的承担者）与代理（实现局部动态的执行者），也无法充分描述高层行动者角色如何约束、选择和组织下层代理行为。填补这一理论空白是本研究的核心动机。

Method: 采用刻意简化和离散的数学形式化方法。通过明确界定行动者-代理的层次关系，定义因果类、聚合算子和离散事件-时间映射这三个结构，构建了一个层次因果关系的形式化体系。

Result: 建立了复杂系统层次因果关系的形式化框架。该框架明确了行动者与代理的概念区分，定义了因果类（抽象因果影响）、聚合算子（跨层级操作）和离散事件-时间映射（事件计数与时钟关系）三个必要结构，为分析复杂系统中的层次因果关系提供了理论基础。

Conclusion: 该框架为理解复杂系统中高层行动者如何通过因果类约束和 Organize 低层代理行为提供了形式化工具。简化离散的建模方式使其易于应用，同时三个核心结构的引入为后续更复杂的层次因果分析奠定了基础。

Abstract: We provide a brief primer for the idea behind formalising hierarchical causality in the context of complex systems. Here actors are not simply agents. Actors instantiate causation classes. Agents implement local dynamics in given levels or organisation in a given system. Hierarchical causality then describes how actor-level roles constrain, select, and organise agent-level behaviour across levels. The system then necessarily requires three additional structures. First, causation classes to abstract a given form of causal influence that an actor instantiates. Second, aggregation operators to move across the levels. Third, discrete event-time maps are required because the system comprises events, and the relation between local event counts and any global clock must be specified. Our formulation here is purposefully simple and discrete.

</details>


### [314] [Agentic-J: An AI Agent for Biological Microscopy Image Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02080)
*Lukas Johanns,Marilin Moor,Davide Panzeri,Yu Zhou,Xinyi Chen,Nora F. K. Pauly,Zixuan Pan,Matthias Gunzer,Andreas Müller,Yiyu Shi,Hedi Peterson,Jianxu Chen*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: Agentic-J是一个容器化的多智能体AI助手，主要用于ImageJ/Fiji，帮助生物学家用自然语言指定图像分析任务（如细胞核分割、细胞追踪、多条件定量等），生成可执行脚本并形成文档化的项目结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物图像分析越来越需要整合异构工具、编程环境和领域知识，而很少有研究人员能够同时掌握这些技能。

Method: 提出Agentic-J系统，包含专门化的子智能体：插件管理、代码生成、调试、质量保证和统计报告。系统将自然语言任务转换为可执行的脚本，并组织成可追溯、可重现的项目结构。

Result: 系统能够从 nuclei 分割、cell tracking 到多条件量化等任务，生成文档化的可执行脚本，使每个分析决策都可追溯，工作流可重现或共享。

Conclusion: 本文介绍了系统设计，展示了真实的生物显微镜图像分析工作流程，并详细说明了技术实现。

Abstract: Biological image analysis increasingly demands integration across heterogeneous tools, programming environments, and domain knowledge that few researchers can command simultaneously. We present Agentic-J, a containerised, multi-agent AI assistant, primarily for ImageJ/Fiji that enables biologists to specify analysis tasks in natural language, from nuclei segmentation and cell tracking to multi-condition quantification. The agent generates executable scripts organised into a documented project structure, so every analysis decision is traceable and the workflow can be reproduced or shared. The specialised sub-agents handle plugin management, code generation, debugging, quality assurance, and statistical reporting. In this paper we introduce the system's design, demonstrate real biological microscopy image analysis workflows, and detailed the technical implementation.

</details>


### [315] [A Game-Theoretic Decision Framework for Optimal Selection of Coordination Detection Methods in Multi-UAV Fleet Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02383)
*Christian Manasseh*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出一种游戏理论决策框架，通过minimax优化解决无人机蜂群监控中检测速度与精度的权衡问题，实现根据运行优先级自适应选择检测方法组合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在共享空域中运营的无人机蜂群协调检测和路线引导飞机识别存在根本性的速度-精度权衡：快速方法虽能支持实时交通管理但牺牲检测精度，而精确方法可能超出空域冲突化解的时间预算。

Method: 构建了一个端到端管道，包含轨迹监控数据、八种候选检测算法、Monte Carlo敏感性分析表征随机性能、以及多目标优化层识别Pareto最优方法组合。将方法选择建模为两人零和游戏（Monitor选择计算方法和参数vs Nature选择未知交通场景），通过minimax解提供稳健的混合策略。

Result: 在200个随机配置（5-50架飞机）上实验表明：框架根据运行优先级推荐不同的方法组合。当优先平衡时Koopman Phase占70.6%，优先速度时占79.7%；优先路线引导识别时CRQA占47.4%。框架在所有测试偏好配置下达到0.29-0.53的保证博弈值（归一化效用）。

Conclusion: 该框架提供了第一个原则性的、场景自适应的UTM蜂群监控计算方法选择方案，保证了0.29-0.53的归一化博弈值，是解决无人机蜂群监控中速度-精度权衡问题的有效方法。

Abstract: Detecting coordination among unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) fleets operating in shared airspace and identifying the route-lead aircraft whose navigation decisions govern fleet behavior presents a fundamental speed--accuracy trade-off: fast methods enable real-time traffic management but sacrifice detection fidelity, while accurate methods may exceed the time budget for actionable airspace deconfliction. This paper presents a game-theoretic decision framework that resolves this trade-off by formulating method selection as a two-player zero-sum game between a Monitor (selecting computational methods and parameters) and Nature (selecting the unknown traffic scenario). We construct an end-to-end pipeline from trajectory surveillance data through eight candidate detection algorithms, a Monte Carlo sensitivity analysis characterizing their stochastic performance, and finally a multi-objective optimization layer that identifies Pareto-optimal method portfolios. The minimax solution provides a robust mixed strategy with a probability distribution over methods that guarantees worst-case performance regardless of scenario uncertainty. Experimental evaluation across 200 randomized configurations spanning 5--50 aircraft demonstrates that the framework recommends distinct method portfolios depending on operational priority: Koopman Phase dominates balanced (70.6%) and speed-priority (79.7%) profiles, while CRQA emerges as primary (47.4%) when route-lead identification is prioritized. The framework achieves a guaranteed game value of 0.29--0.53 (normalized utility) across all tested preference profiles, providing the first principled, scenario-adaptive methodology for computational method selection in UTM fleet monitoring operations.

</details>

### [317] [On Fréchet Traveling Salesmen Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01147)
*Omrit Filtser,Tzalik Maimon,Michal Moiseev*

Main category: cs.CG

TL;DR: 研究引入了一种基于Fréchet距离的新问题设定：两个代理需要访问同一组给定站点，同时保持两人轨迹之间的Fréchet距离最小化。该问题是旅行商问题(TSP)的变体，提出了离散Fréchet距离下的近线性算法，并证明连续Fréchet距离下问题为NP难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Fréchet距离传统上仅用于评估曲线相似性，作者希望拓展其应用场景到多代理协同任务中，如路由和网络规划。两个代理需要共同访问一组站点但要保持紧密联系，这是一个实际而有价值的问题设定。

Method: 设计了近线性时间算法求解离散Fréchet距离版本的问题，并探索了多种问题变体（包括最小化曲线长度、平衡分配站点数等）。对于连续Fréchet距离版本，进行了复杂度分析。

Result: 成功设计了离散Fréchet距离下的近线性算法，并证明了连续Fréchet距离下该问题为NP困难问题。同时探索了几种变体问题的求解方法。

Conclusion: 将Fréchet距离从单纯的相似性度量拓展到多代理协同路径规划的新应用场景是可行的。离散版本存在多项式时间近似线性算法，而连续版本则具有较高的计算复杂度。

Abstract: The Fréchet distance is a well-studied distance measure between two curves. In this work, we demonstrate that the merit of Fréchet distance extends beyond evaluating similarity, and introduce a new setting in which it proves useful. Consider a situation where two agents are required to visit a given set of sites, while staying close to each other throughout their traversal. In this paper, we study problems where the goal is to construct two curves whose vertices are from a given set of points, under the constraint that the Fréchet distance between the curves is kept as small as possible. This problem can be viewed as a variant of the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP), and thus may be of interest in routing, network planning and more. We present a near-linear algorithm for this problem under the discrete Fréchet distance, and explore several variants of the problem, including minimizing the lengths of the curves and balancing the number of sites assigned to each agent. Lastly, we prove that the problem is NP-hard under the continuous Fréchet Distance.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [318] [Position Paper: Post-Solve Robustness in Decision Engines: Feasible Regions and Smoothness Under Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00002)
*Yi-Xiang Hu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出在优化求解器后增加一个"后求解鲁棒性层"，用于审计MILP求解得到的 incumbent 解是否在参数扰动下保持可行性和近优性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际工业系统中，成本、需求或资源可用性的微小变化可能导致原本的最优方案变得不可行或产生质变解。目前的优化流程缺少这一后求解鲁棒性评估维度。

Method: 形式化两个核心概念：(i)ε-近優可行性邻域：捕获 incumbent 在参数扰动下仍可行且近优的区域；(ii)决策空间中的解平滑性：捕获小幅组合编辑后的替代方案是否具有竞争力。并综合敏感性分析、鲁棒优化、邻域搜索、对抗测试和学习增强等方法。

Result: 提出四大研究议程：认证的 incumbent 内近似、概率鲁棒性估计与校准不确定性、对抗鲁棒性边界、以及与求解器验证对齐的学习式预测与解释。给出了简洁的报告模板和评估协议。

Conclusion: 主张将鲁棒性作为决策引擎的一等输出，使优化解决方案在实际部署中更加可靠。

Abstract: Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) decision engines routinely output nominally optimal plans for high-stakes industrial systems. Yet deployment rarely matches solve-time assumptions: small perturbations in costs, demands, or resource availability can invalidate feasibility or trigger discontinuous shifts to qualitatively different solutions. We argue that this post-solve robustness gap is a missing layer in today's optimization pipelines and a missing evaluation dimension for learning-enabled decision systems. Rather than replacing robust optimization or stochastic programming, the proposed layer audits a solved incumbent and returns solver-backed evidence about how far that solution can be trusted. We formalize two central objects: (i) an $ε$-near-optimal feasible neighborhood in parameter space, capturing when an incumbent remains feasible and near-optimal under perturbations, and (ii) solution smoothness in decision space, capturing whether nearby alternatives with small combinatorial edits remain competitive. We then synthesize the most relevant partial answers from sensitivity and stability analysis, robust optimization, neighborhood search, adversarial testing, and learning-based enhancements, and articulate an agenda for a unified post-solve robustness layer. Concretely, we call for certified inner approximations around the incumbent, probabilistic robustness estimation with calibrated uncertainty, adversarial robustness margins, and learning-based prediction and explanation aligned with solver-backed verification. We conclude with a compact reporting template and evaluation protocol that would make robustness a first-class output of decision engines.

</details>


### [319] [Emergent Collaborative Deliberation in Multi-Model AI Systems: A BFT-Derived Protocol for Epistemic Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00005)
*VD Doske*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Consilium协议，一种源自拜占庭容错的结构化多模型AI deliberation架构，将模型间分歧视为认知信号而非错误。该协议为语言模型分配工程化认知角色，并引入样本内/样本外验证框架。实验表明：认知角色决定认知行为；RLHF对齐训练产生特定领域认知盲点；协议本身无方向性偏见；样本外证据检索验证了100%Claims并发现167个盲点。可重现性±2.2%，成本仅217美元。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI系统将模型间分歧视为错误而非有用信息，缺乏能够区分训练数据共识与经验 grounding结论的多模型deliberation框架。此外，RLHF对齐训练似乎会产生可测量的特定领域认知盲点。

Method: 协议为语言模型分配工程化认知角色，将模型本体与推理方式分离。采用金融量化Adapt的In-Sample/Out-of-Sample验证框架。进行1,478次deliberation会话，覆盖10个领域类别的32个主题。通过证据检索进行验证。

Result: 关键发现：(1) 认知角色而非底层模型决定认知行为——低价模型产出可比拟高价模型；(2) RLHF创建特定领域认知盲点——争议政策话题对抗性挑战降低12.3个百分点；AI安全话题呈现不对称偏见(Δ=11.6%)；(3) 无方向性偏见(移民Δ=2.3%，可再生能源Δ=1.2%)；(4) 样本外证据检索以100%成功率验证239个Claims，发现167个盲点。可重现性±2.2%，总成本217美元。

Conclusion: 成功引入一种新的结构化多模型AI deliberation协议，表明通过认知角色可将模型"是什么"与"如何推理"分离，实现低成本高可靠性，有效揭示RLHF对齐的认知盲点且不产生自身偏见。

Abstract: We present the Consilium Protocol, a Byzantine Fault Tolerance-derived architecture for structured multi-model AI deliberation that treats inter-model disagreement as epistemic signal rather than error. The protocol assigns engineered cognitive personas to language models -- separating what a model is from how it reasons -- and introduces an In-Sample/Out-of-Sample validation framework adapted from quantitative finance to distinguish training-data consensus from empirically grounded conclusions. Across 1,478 deliberation sessions spanning 32 topics in 10 domain categories, we demonstrate that (1) the cognitive persona, not the underlying model, determines epistemic behavior: free edge-inference models costing 0.0002 USD per batch produced comparable analytical output to frontier models costing 10.69 USD; (2) RLHF alignment training creates measurable, domain-specific epistemic blind spots -- contested policy topics exhibit 12.3 percentage points less adversarial challenge than settled science topics, and AI safety topics show asymmetric bias ($Δ$=11.6%) where models challenge claims that AI is dangerous far more vigorously than claims that AI risk is overstated; (3) the protocol exhibits no directional bias of its own (immigration $Δ$=2.3%, renewables $Δ$=1.2%); and (4) out-of-sample evidence retrieval validated 239 claims with 100% evidence retrieval and surfaced 167 blind-spot discoveries invisible to training-data deliberation. Run-to-run reproducibility across randomized model$\times$persona assignments averages $\pm$2.2% standard deviation. Total cost for the complete battery including all overhead: 217 USD. We release the protocol specification under MIT license to enable independent verification.

</details>


### [320] [Deliberative Curation: A Protocol for Multi-Agent Knowledge Bases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00007)
*Steven Johnson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 随着AI智能体从孤立工具演变为共享知识生态系统的协作参与者，如何治理群体知识管理成为关键挑战。传统人类平台治理机制无法直接迁移（智能体无状态削弱威慑制裁、模型同质化破坏群体智慧独立性假设、谄媚性瓦解协商共识）。论文提出三层治理的协商管理协议：知识制品生命周期形式化、信誉加权协商投票、适应无状态智能体的分级制裁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 核心问题在于AI智能体具有无状态特性、模型同质化和谄媚倾向，导致传统人类平台的威慑式制裁、独立性假设下的群体智慧和民主协商机制失效。需要专为AI智能体设计的治理机制来应对协作知识管理中的 adversaries（对手/恶意行为）。
